creator: russo@bogodyn.org
text:
I am not updating piecemeal, I'm using portupgrade which is supposedly updating them in order taking account interdependencies into account.

qt6-declarative was, in fact, updated already by that process:

> pkg info 'qt6-*'
qt6-5compat-6.6.3
qt6-base-6.7.0
qt6-base_sqldriver-sqlite-6.7.0
qt6-declarative-6.7.0
qt6-languageserver-6.7.0
qt6-multimedia-6.6.3
qt6-quick3d-6.6.3
qt6-quicktimeline-6.6.3
qt6-shadertools-6.7.0
qt6-svg-6.7.0
qt6-tools-6.6.3


The ones that weren't updated are those that either failed to portupgrade because of staging issues or build issues, or depended on those that failed.

> pkg info -d qt6-5compat
qt6-5compat-6.6.3:
        libxkbcommon-1.7.0_1
        qt6-shadertools-6.7.0
        qt6-declarative-6.7.0
        libglvnd-1.7.0
        qt6-base-6.7.0
        icu-74.2_1,1

> pkg info -d qt6-tools
qt6-tools-6.6.3:
        libxkbcommon-1.7.0_1
        qt6-declarative-6.7.0
        libglvnd-1.7.0
        qt6-base-6.7.0
        llvm15-15.0.7_10
        zstd-1.5.6
